faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I convert {IN} to {OUT} online for free?
faq.a1: Upload your {inputName} file using the drop zone above. Your file is instantly converted to {outputName} format right inside your browser using client-side processing — no account, no software, and no cost. When conversion is complete, click Download to save your {OUT} file.
faq.q2: Is converting {IN} to {OUT} online safe and private?
faq.a2: Completely. Our converter runs 100% in your browser using local processing, so your {IN} file never leaves your device or touches any external server. We do not store, access, or transmit your files at any point.
faq.q3: What is the maximum file size for {IN} to {OUT} conversion?
faq.a3: Desktop: up to 500 MB. Mobile: up to 200 MB. All processing happens locally in your browser — your files are never uploaded to any server.
faq.q1single: How do I convert {IN} files online?
faq.a1single: Upload your {inputName} file using the drop zone above. Choose your target format from the selector, and your file converts instantly right inside your browser. When conversion is complete, click Download to save your file.
faq.q2single: Is converting {IN} files online safe and private?
faq.a2single: Completely. Our converter runs 100% in your browser, so your {IN} file never leaves your device or touches any external server. We do not store, access, or transmit your files.
faq.q3single: What is the maximum file size for {IN} conversion?
faq.a3single: Desktop: up to 500 MB. Mobile: up to 200 MB. All processing happens locally in your browser — your files are never uploaded to any server.

footer.description: Convert any file format directly in your browser. No uploads to servers, no privacy concerns. Your files stay on your device.
